world.title: Ample world inventories may soften El Nino food supply shock
world.description: A potential super El Niño is expected to disrupt global weather patterns and threaten agricultural output in the coming months, but large existing food inventories and strong harvests in key producing regions may soften the impact.

economy.title: Japan Inflation Stays Below 2% For Fourth Straight Month
economy.description: Japan's nationwide consumer price index rose 1.4% in May from a year earlier, staying below 2% for the fourth straight month as lower rice, gasoline, utility and school tuition costs helped curb the overall increase. (News On Japan)
